title: Strip stale findings from report body
goal: Before embedding the run report's free text as '# Implementation report' in the done/verify/adversarial prompts, strip any existing '## Adversarial findings' / '## Verify findings' sections (up to the next heading of the same or higher level), so repeated reviews don't stack duplicated/recursive findings and the reviewer doesn't read prior verdicts as the implementation log — covered by tests for edge cases.

steps.title: Add stripFindingsSections helper
steps.detail: In src/state/runReport.ts a pure function stripFindingsSections(body: string): string that removes '## Adversarial findings' and '## Verify findings' sections (case-insensitive heading match, CRLF/BOM normalized) from their heading up to the next heading of level ## or higher (#) or end of text; leaves other text and other ## sections intact; trims surplus blank lines.

steps.title: Unit tests for stripFindingsSections edge cases
steps.detail: Tests in src/state/runReport.test.ts: section mid-body, at end of file, two consecutive sections, no such section (body unchanged), section followed by a # heading, empty/whitespace body, CRLF variant; a same-named ## heading with non-findings content is NOT removed (exact title match).

steps.title: Apply helper at the three embed sites
steps.detail: In src/prompts/sessionContext.ts run reportBody through stripFindingsSections before the '# Implementation report' bodyBlock in done/verify/adversarial; an empty result after stripping behaves as 'no report' (done/verify: empty block; adversarial: keep the git-diff fallback line).

steps.title: Prompt-level tests: stale sections don't reach the prompt
steps.detail: Add tests in sessionContext.test.ts / context.test.ts that when reportBody contains '## Adversarial findings'/'## Verify findings' the resulting prompt no longer contains them but keeps legitimate surrounding report text; cover all three builders.

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and tests pass
steps.detail: npm run build, typecheck and the full test suite green; no prompt snapshot regression.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 177: Strip stale findings from report body
